name: &GG&glenn&c's house.
description:
&GG&glenn&n lives here since the great battle against Lavos ended and the party
was disband.  &GG&glenn&n remains like a frog, but it doesn't bore him anymore,
he could live like this forever with the memories of the great jorney he made
with Chronos.  The house looks clean and well arranged with some small pieces
of wodden used like small sofa.
